# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    type: s3
    settings:
      bucket: your-s3-bucket-name
      region: your-region
      base_path: your/base/path
      access_key: your-access-key
      secret_key: your-secret-key

  file_share:
    type: fs
    settings:
      location: /mount/backups
      compress: true

  schedule:
    cron: "0 0 * * *"  # Daily at midnight
    retention:
      max_count: 30  # Keep last 30 snapshots

  creation:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false

  restoration:
    indices: "*"
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true

security:
  enabled: false
